title: My Morning Routine
content: Every weekday, Olivia follows the same morning routine. She wakes up at six o’clock and immediately opens the curtains to let sunlight into her room. Then she brushes her teeth, takes a shower, and prepares breakfast. Usually, she eats toast and drinks coffee while reading messages on her phone. Before leaving for work, Olivia waters her plants and checks the weather outside. She likes routines because they help her feel calm and organized. Starting the morning slowly makes the rest of her day much easier.
